scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli-mcp build
scripts.generate:api-map: node scripts/generate-brokerage-openapi.mjs && node scripts/generate-unified-api-map.mjs && node scripts/generate-brokerage-markdown.mjs && node scripts/generate-brokerage-curl.mjs && node scripts/generate-endpoint-markdown.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test:built
scripts.test:built: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli exec vitest run && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli-mcp exec vitest run
scripts.coverage: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm coverage:built
scripts.coverage:built: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli test:coverage && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli-mcp test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/robinhood-cli-mcp typecheck
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm deadcode && corepack pnpm test:api-map && corepack pnpm test:skill
